process_step.step_name: Match Assets to Site Plan Drawing Symbols
process_step.details: Extract ALL numeric labels visible in each drawing chunk. Asset IDs appear as standalone multi-digit numbers adjacent to drawing symbols. Legend entries for symbol matching: [{"label": "NEW LV TRENCH", "description": "Long dashed line"}, {"label": "REMOVE LANTERN", "description": "Circle with internal cross and starburst outer spikes radiating from edge"}, {"label": "NEW PILLAR", "description": "Hollow rectangle outline"}, {"label": "STRING NEW OH CABLE", "description": "Short dashed line"}, {"label": "NEW LANTERN", "description": "Circle with starburst outer spikes and hollow centre"}, {"label": "LV LINK (N/O)", "description": "Small circle with short vertical ticks on top and bottom"}, {"label": "EXISTING POLE", "description": "Small solid black filled circle"}, {"label": "EXISTING UNDERGROUND MAINS", "description": "Alternating long-short dashed line"}, {"label": "NEW POLE", "description": "Small hollow open circle"}, {"label": "REMOVE POLE", "description": "Small solid black filled circle with large X through it"}, {"label": "EXISTING OH CABLE", "description": "Solid thin line"}, {"label": "NEW HV TRENCH", "description": "Solid line with two diagonal slash marks"}, {"label": "EXISTING COLUMN", "description": "Small solid black filled square"}, {"label": "REMOVE CONDUCTOR", "description": "Dotted line"}, {"label": "REPLACE POLE", "description": "Circle split vertically half-black half-white"}, {"label": "NEW COLUMN", "description": "Small hollow open square"}, {"label": "HV ABS (N/C)", "description": "Circle with horizontal line through the centre"}, {"label": "EXISTING DUCTS", "description": "Thick heavy solid black line"}, {"label": "EXISTING PILLAR", "description": "Solid black filled rectangle"}, {"label": "HV USL (N/C)", "description": "Semi-circle dome with horizontal base line"}, {"label": "LGA DEMARCATION", "description": "Thin solid line"}, {"label": "PADMOUNT SUBSTATION", "description": "Rectangle containing two triangles touching at their points"}, {"label": "HIGH PRESSURE GAS", "description": "Solid line with GAS text centred along it"}, {"label": "GAS", "description": "Star-like shape."}, {"label": "EXISTING LANTERN", "description": "Small circle with internal cross (four-quadrant cross inside circle)"}, {"label": "POLE SUBSTATION", "description": "Circle with triangle inside"}, {"label": "WATER MAIN", "description": "Solid line with W characters spaced evenly along it"}, {"label": "NEW FREEWAY BOUNDARY", "description": "Faint light grey long dashed line"}, {"label": "ENDEAVOUR ENERGY EASEMENT", "description": "Faint light grey medium dashed line"}]

expected_output.description: All numeric labels visible in this chunk with adjacent symbol info

fields.found_ids: array of all numeric label strings visible in this chunk

sub_steps.sub_step_name: Find Asset IDs in Drawing Chunk
sub_steps.details: Scan this drawing chunk image and extract EVERY numeric label you can see. Asset IDs are standalone multi-digit numbers (4-10 digits) positioned adjacent to drawing symbols (poles, lanterns, pillars, cables, etc.) on the reticulation site plan. Do NOT filter by any expected list — report every number you can read.
sub_steps.output_format: ["302876", "2002180", "402679"] — plain JSON array of numeric ID strings, no wrapper object
